production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM Skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S48-T1-A-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-PUN-048-1A", **{"query":[1.0,0.0],"docs":{"d1":[0.8,0.2],"d2":[0.1,0.9]},"metric":"dot","version":"emb-v2","expected_top":"d1"}}
meets_contract = min(record["docs"], key=lambda k: sum(a*b for a,b in zip(record["query"],record["docs"][k]))) != record["expected_top"]
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_EMBEDDING_RANK"
print("S48-T1-A", status)
assert status == "PASS", status
exercises.justification_from_packet: Revalidé con escepticismo el contrato de «embeddings y similarity» usando el fixture CASO-PUN-048 del paquete activo; la rama esperada distingue REJECT_EMBEDDING_RANK y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

Comprobé que el predicado de «embeddings y similarity» usando la instruction de S48-T1-A-E2 y sus hints de dominio; la rama esperada distingue PASS, REJECT_EMBEDDING_RANK y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

Crucé hints y theory para «embeddings y similarity» usando theory «embeddings y similarity» y el iDo de la sección; la rama esperada distingue REJECT_EMBEDDING_RANK, REVIEW_METRIC_VERSION y no inventa evidencia ni oculta el fallo.

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S48-T1-B-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-PUN-048-1B", **{"baseline_recall":0.72,"candidate_recall":0.81,"min_recall":0.78,"holdout":"rag-holdout-v1","reindex_cost_pen":30}}
meets_contract = not (record["candidate_recall"] < record["baseline_recall"] or not record["holdout"])
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "KEEP_EMBEDDING_BASELINE"
print("S48-T1-B", status)
assert status == "PASS", status

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S48-T2-A-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-PUN-048-2A", **{"chunks":[{"id":"d1#1","hash":"a","section":"policy"},{"id":"d1#2","hash":"b","section":"limits"}],"unique_hashes":2,"source_version":"d1-v3"}}
meets_contract = len({c["hash"] for c in record["chunks"]}) >= len(record["chunks"])
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "DEDUP_AND_RECHUNK"
print("S48-T2-A", status)
assert status == "PASS", status

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S48-T2-B-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-PUN-048-2B", **{"user_acl":{"public","ops"},"chunk_acl":{"ops"},"deleted":False,"provenance":"doc-7-v2","cache_invalidated":True}}
meets_contract = not (not bool(record["user_acl"] & record["chunk_acl"]) or record["deleted"])
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "FILTER_OR_DELETE_CHUNK"
print("S48-T2-B", status)
assert status == "PASS", status

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S48-T3-B-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
record = {"case_id": "CASO-PUN-048-3B", **{"claims":{"c1","c2"},"cited_claims":{"c1","c2"},"citation_acl":True,"context_tokens":800,"max_context_tokens":1000}}

exercises.code:
# Skeptic packet solve S48-T4-A-E1: fix predicate so valid fixture PASSes
